title: gladiolus antandroyi
intro: Gladiolus antandroyi, also known as the Antandroy gladiolus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae, native to the island of Madagascar. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Gladiolus antandroyi include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant, typically in the form of infusions or decoctions, are often used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
